tasks.subject: Phase 3 — subagent tools in agents/
tasks.description:
Implement Phase 3 of plan.md exactly as specified. Read prd.md and plan.md "Phase 3" section first. Phases 1 (a3109ff) and 2 (ed3644c) are done.

Deliverables:
1. `extensions/agents/subagent-tools.ts` — port `Agent`, `get_subagent_result`, `steer_subagent` registrations + Typebox schemas verbatim from current `extensions/orchestration/index.ts`. Trim to only what the tools need.
2. `extensions/agents/subagent-runner.ts` — wraps existing `extensions/orchestration/agent-runner.ts` via direct import (`../orchestration/agent-runner.js`). EXPLICITLY ALLOWLISTED transitional cross-extension import; removed in P7. Provide a `spawn(...)`-style helper used by the tool registrations.
3. `extensions/agents/subagent-bus.ts` — calls `publishOrchestration` and `publishSubagentUsage` from `extensions/ui/bus.ts` at the same publish points orchestration/ uses today.
4. `extensions/agents/lifecycle-events.ts` — exports event name + payload type. Event name MUST be `agents:subagent_end`. Payload: `{ agentId: string; status: "success" | "failure" | "stopped"; createdByTaskId?: string }`. Document at top of file.
5. Emit `agents:subagent_end` from runner completion path (success, failure, stop) inside `subagent-runner.ts`'s wrapper.
6. `extensions/orchestration/index.ts`: register the three subagent tools ONLY when `!settings.agents?.enabled`. Guard must precede registration within ~30 lines.
7. `extensions/agents/index.ts` registers the three subagent tools (gated on `agents.enabled`).
8. Update `scripts/check-invariants.sh` allowed-events list to include `agents:subagent_end`.

Create `scripts/phase3-verify.sh` per plan: 5 checks listed in Phase 3 section. Smoke step: minimal arm or manual-checklist exit 0 (same pattern as Phase 2).

Acceptance: check-build, check-invariants, phase3-verify all exit 0. No TUI chrome in extensions/agents/.

After green: update plan.md Phase 3 checkboxes `- [ ]` → `- [x]`. Commit: `phase 3: subagent tools + lifecycle event in agents/`.

Report: files created, verify output, commit SHA. Do NOT proceed to Phase 4.
